summary: Completed comprehensive testing of POSx Suite new features and bug fixes. All 22 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI tests verified: Users bug fix (SelectItem value='none'), Suppliers CRUD, Reports page, Accounts P&L, Products cost/markup, Settings Company tab.
passed_tests: Backend: Auth login with admin PIN 123456
Backend: Suppliers CRUD - create, get, update, delete
Backend: Expenses CRUD - create, get, delete
Backend: Accounts summary - P&L with revenue, COGS, gross profit, expenses, net profit
Backend: Reports sales - daily_sales, top_products, payment_breakdown
Backend: Users CRUD - create, get, update, delete
Backend: Products with cost_price and markup_percentage
Frontend: Login with keypad PIN entry
Frontend: Admin Dashboard shows all 10 menu items (Users, Outlets, Products, Inventory, Suppliers, Customers, Orders, Reports, Accounts, Tables, Settings)
Frontend: Users page - Add User dialog opens, form submits successfully, 'User created successfully' toast shown - BUG FIX VERIFIED
Frontend: Suppliers page - Add Supplier dialog works, CRUD operations functional
Frontend: Reports page - Shows Total Revenue, Total Orders, Avg Order Value cards, Daily Sales chart, Top Products table
Frontend: Accounts page - Shows P&L summary (Revenue, COGS, Gross Profit, Expenses, Net Profit), Expenses by Category, Recent Expenses table, Add Expense works
Frontend: Products page - Cost Price, Markup %, Sales Price fields present, auto-calculation works (10 * 1.5 = 15.00)
Frontend: Settings page - Company tab is default, has Logo URL, Address, Phone, Email, Tax ID fields
critical_code_review_comments: Users bug fix verified - SelectItem value changed from '' to 'none' with transform
Products cost/markup auto-calculation working as expected
Settings Company tab properly saves to backend
seed_data_creation: Used existing seed data, created test users/suppliers/expenses during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features verified working: (1) Users bug fix - SelectItem value='none' fix works, user creation shows success toast. (2) Suppliers CRUD fully functional. (3) Reports page shows sales summary, daily chart, top products, payment breakdown. (4) Accounts page shows P&L with COGS calculation from product cost_price. (5) Products have cost_price, markup_percentage, price fields with auto-calculation. (6) Settings Company tab saves logo, address, phone, email, tax_id. Backend has 22 passing tests in /app/backend/tests/test_api_endpoints.py.
